response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most roles centered on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web stacks; while there is a brief mention of C++ at National Instruments, it is not contextualized with modern STL, multi-threading, or secure development practices required for the role, and there is no evidence of IoT, MQTT, IEC 62443, or cloud platform experience.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across diverse technologies.
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical mentoring through workshops.
Proven ability to deliver complex systems in distributed and real-time environments.
concerns: Minimal to no recent C++ or STL work aligned with industrial automation requirements.
No evidence of experience with message brokers, MQTT, IEC 62443, or industrial cybersecurity standards.
Lacks cloud platform exposure (Azure) and clear background in IoT or industrial protocols (OPC UA, Modbus, etc.).
